case_title: JAMES SASAKI VS. PAMELA JOY SCEIZINA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SASAKI, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION OF PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. ON 6/4/02. $4,600.00 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,775.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SASAKI, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCEIZINA, PAMELA JOY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 900 BUSH ST. #717, S.F. CA. 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
